ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the region in meters */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the climate data was collected */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the year the climate data was collected */,
  "NDVI" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index */,
  "BT" REAL /* Brightness temperature */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation in millimeters */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in meters per second */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Average cloud cover percentage */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation index entry */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data entry the index is associated with */,
  "VCI" REAL /* Vegetation condition index */,
  "TCI" REAL /* Temperature condition index */,
  "VHI" REAL /* Vegetation health index */,
  "EVI" REAL /* Enhanced Vegetation Index */,
  "LAI" REAL /* Leaf Area Index */,
  "GNDVI" REAL /* Green Normalized Difference Vegetation Index */,
  "NDWI" REAL /* Normalized Difference Water Index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_indices_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "climate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_climate_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_id") REFERENCES climate_data ("climate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data (e.g., image, GeoJSON) */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., topographic, satellite) */,
  "map_date" TEXT /* Date when the map data was created */,
  "map_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the map (e.g., 1:25000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Chart data (e.g., image, CSV) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date when the chart data was created */,
  "chart_title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_yield" REAL /* Average yield of the crop in the region */,
  "crop_season" TEXT /* Season when the crop is typically grown */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop (e.g., cereal, fruit) */,
  "irrigation" TEXT /* Irrigation method used (e.g., rain-fed, irrigated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_crops_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_soil" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the region */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Average moisture level of the soil in the region */,
  "soil_ph" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "soil_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil (e.g., clay, loam) */,
  "soil_fertility" TEXT /* Fertility level of the soil (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_soil_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_climate_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "NDVI_trend" REAL /* Trend in NDVI over time */,
  "BT_trend" REAL /* Trend in BT over time */,
  "precipitation_trend" REAL /* Trend in precipitation over time */,
  "humidity_trend" REAL /* Trend in humidity over time */,
  "wind_speed_trend" REAL /* Trend in wind speed over time */,
  "cloud_cover_trend" REAL /* Trend in cloud cover over time */,
  "solar_radiation_trend" REAL /* Trend in solar radiation over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_climate_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_vegetation_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "VCI_trend" REAL /* Trend in VCI over time */,
  "TCI_trend" REAL /* Trend in TCI over time */,
  "VHI_trend" REAL /* Trend in VHI over time */,
  "EVI_trend" REAL /* Trend in EVI over time */,
  "LAI_trend" REAL /* Trend in LAI over time */,
  "GNDVI_trend" REAL /* Trend in GNDVI over time */,
  "NDWI_trend" REAL /* Trend in NDWI over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_vegetation_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "VCI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between VCI and BT */,
  "TCI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between TCI and BT */,
  "VHI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between VHI and BT */,
  "EVI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between EVI and BT */,
  "LAI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between LAI and BT */,
  "GNDVI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between GNDVI and BT */,
  "NDWI_BT_correlation" REAL /* Correlation between NDWI and BT */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_correlations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
